coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Just go easy and stay comfortable. Your aerobic system will thank you later.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building your aerobic foundation. Consistency is key.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Fat oxidation zone - maximize mitochondrial efficiency at low intensity.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Keep it easy, maintain steady pace, build aerobic base.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Welcome to FTP. Where your legs wonder why you hate them so much.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is FTP work - the gold standard for raising your ceiling. Stay strong!
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Sustained FTP stimulus drives maximal lactate steady-state adaptation.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Hold steady power. Even pacing throughout. You've trained for this.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Your lactate system is about to get a serious wake-up call.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is anaerobic power. You're training your body to sustain intensity.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: High-intensity anaerobic stimulus drives glycolytic power and lactate tolerance.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Explosive effort. Go hard and trust your training.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Welcome to FTP. Where your legs wonder why you hate them so much.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is FTP work - the gold standard for raising your ceiling. Stay strong!
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Sustained FTP stimulus drives maximal lactate steady-state adaptation.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Easy spinning. Just don't fall asleep.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Active recovery enhances blood flow and promotes adaptation.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Low-intensity active recovery facilitates lactate clearance.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Keep it easy and enjoy the ride.
